item_titles: [AINews] SpaceXAI launches Grok 4.5, first Opus-class model post Cursor acquisition
SpaceXAI releases Grok 4.5, which Elon describes as an ‘Opus-class model’
Grok 4.5 is so cheap compared to Fable 5 and GPT 5.5 that benchmark gaps may not matter much
clusters.summary: xAI 正式发布 Grok 4.5 模型，马斯克称其达到 Opus 级别。该模型在保持高性能的同时大幅降低了推理成本和 token 消耗。
clusters.title: xAI 发布 Grok 4.5 模型

item_titles: 同声传译一夜失业！GPT-Live瞬间翻译，老太太现场抬杠AI看傻全网
ChatGPT can now listen and talk at the same time, making AI conversations seem more human
OpenAI releases new voice models for more natural live conversations
clusters.summary: OpenAI 发布全新 GPT-Live 语音模型，支持同时听和说，大幅提升了实时翻译和自然对话体验。
clusters.title: OpenAI 推出支持全双工实时对话的 GPT-Live 语音模型

item_titles: Public LLM benchmarks are mostly garbage
Separating signal from noise in coding evaluations
clusters.summary: OpenAI 和多位开发者指出，包括 SWE-Bench Pro 在内的许多公开大语言模型基准测试存在严重缺陷，容易产生误导。
clusters.title: 公开 LLM 基准测试的可靠性受质疑

item_titles: Meta tests always-on AI glasses that capture your entire day
Meta wants its AI glasses to seem less creepy. Its AI strategy says otherwise.
clusters.summary: Meta 正在测试全天候捕捉用户视听数据的“超级感知”AI 眼镜，同时为防止偷拍增加了新的安全防护措施。
clusters.title: Meta 测试全天候 AI 眼镜并加强隐私保护
